text.title: Daily Standup AI Pre-Brief Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether daily-standup-ai-prebrief-template applies. Root question is a concrete observable; branches name a specific input pattern (`when`) and conclude with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team run a daily standup AND data sources are accessible AND team will read a pre-brief?

branch.when: yes AND pre-brief sent late or after standup

example.description: When the root condition holds and the first matching branch fires, the tree concludes with the referenced rule id — meaning the methodology applies via that rule. The agent loads the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follows it. When the root condition does not hold, the tree concludes with `skip-methodology`.
